sections.paragraph:
-

(1) . to break, Arab. فضخ, Eth. ፊጽሐ፡ to be cleft in pieces; see Piel.

(2) פָּצַח רִנָּה erumpere jubila (Terent. comp. erumpere stomachum, Cic., rumpere questus, Virg., ῥὴξαι φωνήν, Demosth.), to break out into joy, Isa 14:7 44:23 49:13 54:1 55:12 . Elsewhere פָּצַח וְרִנֵּז Isa 52:9 Psa 98:4. (Eth. ተፊሥሐ፡ to rejoice.)

Piel, to break (bones), Mic 3:3.
